text.tspan: EMERGENT LEADER: leadership IS the outcome
of the protocol u2014 not a separate election
+ stable: one leader for many operations
+ no election overhead during stable operation
u2212 each operation pays full coordination cost
u2212 can be hard to optimize reads (no stable leader to ask)
1. Every node runs the same operation
u2022 Basic Paxos: whoever's proposal wins phase 1
u2022 EPaxos: command leader = whoever proposed first
u2022 SWIM / gossip: 'highest ID alive' implicitly leads
u2022 Single-Decree Paxos sequence: leader changes per slot
